title: Alpha
description: Decouples artifact language from role ownership — 'Owns' becomes 'Accountable for' in role cards, 'Owner' becomes 'Steward' in artifact cards, role-prefixed artifact names removed.
highlights: Site restructured to three pages: index (5-min), framework, playbook
Interactive role map with spatial human/agent zones and detail panel
Predictability reframe in Scrum callout: gate model as guarantee, not forecast
Capacity forecasting callout in Section 09: throughput as observed signal, not declared estimate
SDD execution path: Cycle Spec artifact + Orchestrator as spec executor, not planner
Gate nomenclature: Quality Gate (automated) and Release Gate (human) replace role-named gates
Artifact-role decoupling: 'Owns' → 'Accountable for' in role cards; 'Owner' → 'Steward' in artifact cards
Removed role-prefixed artifact names (e.g. 'PO intent statement' → 'Intent Statement')
